pageTitle: Snowboard Size Calculator — Length, Width & Chart
pageDescription: Use our Snowboard Size Calculator to find the perfect board length and width by height, weight & boot size. Includes size chart for men, women & kids.
importantBody: Base length = height (cm) × 0.85, then adjustments for weight (±5 cm), skill (beginner −4 cm, expert +5 cm), and riding style (freestyle −4 cm, powder +5 cm). Width is based on boot size: narrow ≤ US 7.5, standard US 8–10.5, wide ≥ US 11.
resultsSubtitle: Recommended length, width, and size range
emptyHint: Enter your height, weight, boot size, and riding profile, then click Calculate.
